news.t: Schwab Asset Management Announces Index and Fund Name Changes to Its Fundamental Index ETF and Mutual Fund Family

holdings.infoBox: FNDF is an equity ETF with a total of 906 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 4.54%, Shell at 2.17%, TotalEnergies SE at 1.57%, BHP Group at 1.12%, and SK hynix at 1.10%.

overview.description: The Schwab Fundamental International Equity ETF (FNDF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of large firms from developed markets ex-US. The fund selects and weights using fundamental factors. FNDF was launched on Aug 15, 2013 and is issued by Charles Schwab.
